title: ruellia pumila
intro: Ruellia pumila, also known as Dwarf Ruellia or Mexican Gold, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant native to Mexico. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and flowers, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Ruellia pumila can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions like fever, sore throats, and skin irritations.
